subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

It was great connecting at the conference, and thanks for following up.

I’d be happy to set up a 30-minute call next week to explore a potential partnership. Could you please send over a couple of specific time windows that work well for you (including your timezone) between Monday and Thursday? I’ll confirm a slot from our side based on that.

On the senior-level technical call: I’m not able to share direct contact details for our CTO or VP of Engineering. Once we’ve had an initial discussion and identified the right next steps, I can help coordinate any follow-up conversation with the appropriate technical stakeholders on our side.

Looking forward to your suggested times.

Best regards,
Agent
